race.comment: MIGHTY JOLT (2) scored by a nose at Hobart over 2579m last start, the second win from his past six runs. Facing a tougher assignment but he is good enough to cope. IMPERIAL LAZ NZ (8) is in good form at present. Finished second at his latest appearance over 2579m at Hobart, beaten a nose. Finds a tougher race but a big run is on the cards. PHOTO FIRST (5) is worth plenty of thought off a last-start win by 1.4 metres at Launceston over 2200m. CUSTOM HARLEY (1) could only finish seventh over 2579m at Hobart most recently. Open to improvement and is in the mix.
